creator: ae@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like the router, that sent general query uses very small "Maximum Response Delay" for such number of groups - 125 milliseconds. Is it possible to increase it? What is the system and software used on this router? 
FreeBSD limits the burst of replies to 4 packets, thereafter not yet sent packets will be send only after ~500 ms delay. Since response delay is very small, probably router just doesn't wait all packets?
